displayTitle: Darth Vader (2015) Vol. 3: The Shu-Torun War
synopsis: The unstoppable march of the Dark Lord of the Sith continues! The natives of the planet Shu-Torun are revolting. And there's no way the Empire will stand for that. Darth Vader is tasked with leading a military assault against Shu-Torun! Could it be that his rise to glory has begun? But who will follow Vader into war? Would you? Then again, it's better to fight alongside Vader than against him. That's a lesson that the Ore Barons are about to learn…
title: Darth Vader (2015) Vol. 3: The Shu-Torun War
